name: Hash's Personalized AI Workstation — Ultra Performance
description: A silent, space-efficient AI powerhouse hand-configured for each client. Wrapped in a CNC-machined aerospace aluminum chassis, it fuses Apple Silicon with a custom liquid-vapor chamber for sustained on-device inference, fine-tuning, and creative workloads.

specs.AI_UseCase: On-device LLM inference, Stable Diffusion, fine-tuning 70B models

name: Hash Nebula H200 GPU Server
description: Data-center grade 8-GPU server built for frontier-scale training. Featuring NVIDIA H200 Tensor Core GPUs with 141GB HBM3e each, NVLink 5.0 fabric, and redundant 3000W titanium PSUs. The gold standard for training foundation models.

specs.CPU: Dual Intel Xeon Platinum 8592+ (128 cores total)
specs.AI_UseCase: Foundation model training, distributed pretraining, HPC

name: Hash Quantum Cluster Q-1
description: A turnkey 32-node AI supercluster delivering multi-exaflop performance. Liquid-cooled 400GbE InfiniBand fabric with NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 racks. Designed for elite research labs and sovereign-AI deployments.

specs.AI_UseCase: Trillion-parameter training, sovereign AI, climate modeling

name: Hash Edge AI Node — Falcon
description: A ruggedized edge AI appliance engineered for real-time inference at the frontier — factories, vehicles, and remote deployments. IP67-rated, fanless, with hardware-root trust and OTA model deployment.

specs.AI_UseCase: Autonomous robotics, real-time vision, industrial IoT

name: Hash Vault AI Storage Array
description: All-flash AI-native storage system tuned for petabyte-scale dataset streaming. GPUDirect Storage, RDMA over 400GbE, and zero-copy tiering keep your GPUs saturated — never starved.

specs.AI_UseCase: Training dataset hosting, vector DB, RAG pipelines

name: Hash Orion Desktop AI Studio
description: A dual-GPU creative workstation sculpted from brushed titanium. Whisper-quiet liquid cooling drives sustained renders, 3D generation, and local 70B model fine-tuning in studio silence.

name: Hash Vector DB Appliance
description: A purpose-built vector database appliance for sub-10ms semantic search over billions of embeddings. Hardware-accelerated HNSW, native RAG integration, and zero-maintenance clustering.

specs.AI_UseCase: Vector search, RAG backbone, recommendation engines

name: Hash Skyhawk Autonomous Drone
description: An AI-integrated airborne compute platform weighing under 500g. Onboard SLAM, zero-shot object tracking, and autonomous mission planning with 40 TOPS of neural inference — all fully encrypted and field-serviceable.

specs.AI_UseCase: Autonomous navigation, aerial mapping, defense ISR

name: Hash Falcon-X Tactical Drone
description: A carbon-fiber stealth drone with whisper-silent propulsion, encrypted RF link, and onboard AI target-discrimination. Built for reconnaissance, long-endurance patrol, and autonomous mission execution in contested airspace.

specs.AI_UseCase: Tactical reconnaissance, long-endurance patrol, autonomous ISR

name: Hash Stratos Aerial Survey Drone
description: A high-altitude AI survey drone for mapping, agriculture, and infrastructure inspection. On-device CV models fuse dual-camera gimbal data with LiDAR and hyperspectral imaging — 90-minute flight time per charge.

name: Hash Hornet Swarm Drone Kit
description: A ten-unit palm-sized swarm platform with decentralized AI mesh autonomy. Each micro-drone coordinates via low-latency LoRa-AI fabric — ideal for entertainment, research, and tactical swarm ops.

specs.AI_UseCase: Swarm robotics, light shows, decentralized autonomy research

name: Hash Pegasus Cargo Drone
description: A heavy-lift VTOL cargo drone rated for 25 kg payloads over 60 km ranges. AI waypoint routing, redundant octo-rotor propulsion, and weather-hardened aerospace-grade frame deliver autonomous logistics you can trust.

specs.AI_UseCase: Autonomous logistics, medical delivery, industrial cargo

name: Hash Nimbus Racing Drone
description: A featherweight FPV racing drone with sub-millisecond AI-stabilized flight control. 6S carbon frame, 4K HDR low-latency transmission, and an onboard cinematic AI mode for creators.

specs.AI_UseCase: Cinematic FPV, racing competitions, creator content

name: Hash Phantom Nano AI Micro-Drone
description: A 55-gram palm-sized AI micro-drone with on-device neural vision, acoustic-silent brushless propulsion, and 20-minute flight time. Transformer-based SLAM runs natively on its integrated 4-TOPS NPU — pocket-scale autonomy.

specs.AI_UseCase: Covert reconnaissance, indoor inspection, micro-robotics research

name: Hash Titan Heavy AI Cargo Platform
description: A 35 kg heavy-lift industrial VTOL platform rated for 50 kg payloads and 120 km range. AI mission orchestration, multi-modal sensor fusion, and hybrid-electric propulsion enable autonomous logistics at industrial scale.

specs.AI_UseCase: Industrial logistics, offshore resupply, disaster response
